schema.ion.id › core › raise › v1

core/raise/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/raise/v1#  |  Layer: L4 — Cross-sector core  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

IONTicket

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/raise/v1#IONTicket

PropertyMandatoryDescription
idalwaysTicket ID assigned by ION ticketing system.
externalRefoptionalReference ID in external ticketing system (Freshdesk/Jira/Zendesk ticket number)
titlealwaysShort subject line for this ticket.
descriptionalwaysFull description of the issue.
typealwaysNP_DISPUTE: BAP/BPP disagreement on transaction terms. POLICY_VIOLATION: participant violating ION network policy. SETTL
priorityalwaysCRITICAL: network-wide impact or financial fraud. Escalated immediately. HIGH: significant impact on transactions. Respo
raisedByalwaysSubscriber ID of the network participant raising the ticket.
assignedToconditionalSubscriber ID of counterparty NP, or "ION" if raised to network operator.
contractIdconditionalRelated trade contract ID, if issue is transaction-specific.
reconIdoptionalRelated reconciliation session ID, if issue is settlement-related.
statusalwaysOPEN: ticket created, not yet acknowledged. ACKNOWLEDGED: assigned party has received and acknowledged. IN_PROGRESS: act
threadoptionalComplete conversation trail for this ticket.
resolutionoptional
slaoptional
createdAtalways
updatedAtalways
resolvedAtoptional

Pack README

ion-core/raise/v1

NP-to-NP and NP-to-ION issue ticketing. APIs: raise, on_raise, raise_status, on_raise_status, raise_details, on_raise_details.

Attaches to

`ION network channel`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/core/raise/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
